title: Integrations for Custom Automations!
excerpt: For all you automation and integration builders, do we have an exciting update for you! We have gone ahead and released the following “send email/notify” Gmail, Outlook and Slack integration blocks for our custom automat…

posts.author: RonS (Ron Schneider)
posts.cookedHtml:
For all you automation and integration builders, do we have an exciting update for you! We have gone ahead and released the following “send email/notify” Gmail, Outlook and Slack integration blocks for our custom automation builder! Build more robust and customizable workflows than ever before!

We will be releasing the trigger blocks for Gmail, Outlook and Slack soon as well!

This is just the beginning! Stay tuned for more integration blocks and capabilities in our custom automations.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @RonS - Any plans to allow automations that include integrations to copy over when you use a template to create a board? I know we’d need to reauthenticate on the new board, but it would be great if the recipe itself with all the details of the email content and such would copy over. That would save a ton of time and frustration for ourselves and our clients.

posts.author: LouMc (Louise McKay)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely agree with @PolishedGeek on this point - this would save me sooooo many headaches! Looking forward to reading some updates about this.
